---
title: "Adaptation posologique"
---

### Rx Cirrhose {#rx-cirrhose .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.rxcirrhose.ca/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/rxcirrhose.png" alt="Rx Cirrhose">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.rxcirrhose.ca/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Rx Cirrhose</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Université de Montréal
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### GPR {#gpr .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.vidal.fr/gpr.html" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/gpr.png" alt="GPR">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.vidal.fr/gpr.html" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Guide de Prescription en cas d'insuffisance Rénale (GPR)</a>
<div class="outil-source">
VIDAL
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### SwissPedDose {#swisspeddose .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.swisspeddose.ch/fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/swisspeddose.png" alt="SwissPedDose">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.swisspeddose.ch/fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SwissPedDose</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Swissmedic / Universités suisses
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### ClinPGx {#clinpgx .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.clinpgx.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/clinpgx.png" alt="ClinPGx">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.clinpgx.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">ClinPGx</a>
<div class="outil-source">
CPIC / PharmGKB
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### ABXBMI {#abxbmi .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.abxbmi.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/abxbmi.png" alt="ABXBMI">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.abxbmi.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">ABXBMI</a>
<div class="outil-source">
À compléter
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Adaptobese {#adaptobese .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.adaptobese.com/calculator" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/adaptobese.png" alt="Adaptobese">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.adaptobese.com/calculator" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Adaptobese</a>
<div class="outil-source">
À compléter
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
